title: sutera racemosa
intro: Sutera racemosa, also known as the wild sage, is a flowering plant species native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sutera racemosa include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
